root_cause.summary: The pre-commit `mypy (stubtest)` hook reports 279 type errors across 9 pandas source files. The overwhelming majority are `Module has no attribute "X" [attr-defined]` from pyarrow.compute usages; pyarrow's type stubs do not declare the compute functions pandas calls. A handful are `[no-untyped-call]` or `[assignment]`. Fix is on pandas' side (explicit annotations or `# type: ignore[attr-defined]`) or upstream in pyarrow stubs.

required_signals.value: error: Call to untyped function "fill_null" in typed context  [no-untyped-call]
Found 279 errors in 9 files (checked 1458 source files)

evidence_spans.reason: First ~20 mypy errors establish the dominant pattern: pyarrow compute attributes like is_null, if_else, utf8_length are flagged as undefined.
Aggregated error count (279 in 9 files), mypy stubtest hook failure line, and 'not checking stubs due to mypy build errors' cause.
GHA exit-code marker confirming the pre-commit step failed.
